changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Add slug column to channel table for hierarchical identifiers.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE channel ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS slug VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '';

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Create unique index for user channels slug (scoped to user).

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Create unique index for organization channels slug (scoped to org).

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Add documentation for slug column and indexes.
